word: G1237 - διαδέχομαι - diadéchomai - dee-ad-ekh'-om-ahee - Come after

sections.paragraph:
- Original: διαδέχομαι

- Transliteration: Diadechomai

- Phonetic: dee-ad-ekh'-om-ahee

- Definition:

1. to receive through another, anything left or bequeathed by him, to receive in succession, receive in turn, succeed to

- Origin: from G1223 and G1209

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G1223 and G1209; to receive in turn that is (figuratively) succeed to: - come after.
